narrative:
05 Ohio Senate district has 243,876 registered voters, with 55.4% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 30.7% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 13.9%, a pronounced Republican lean of 16.7 percentage points. Registration is trending bluer in younger age cohorts (1990s–2000s births lean -6.5% D−R vs -23.4% for 1950s–60s cohorts).
